meta.siteDescription: The conceptual framework for rebuilding and reviving Islamic civilization. An education program centered on knowledge, wisdom and enlightenment.

hero.title:
Spring Semester 2025–2026
Training Continues
hero.subtitle: 5 levels, 15 academics, 24 different courses — an education program centered on knowledge, wisdom and enlightenment.

mtoDanMesaj.title: Message from MTO
mtoDanMesaj.p1: The School of Civilization Vision was founded to establish the conceptual framework for rebuilding and reviving Islamic civilization. Centering on the triad of knowledge, wisdom and enlightenment, we aim to convey the foundational concepts of our civilization to new generations.
mtoDanMesaj.p2: Our goal is not merely to transfer knowledge, but to cultivate individuals who internalize concepts and bring them to life — individuals who will be the bearers of civilization.

items.ozet: The new semester continues with 5 levels, 15 academics and 24 different courses.
Tahsin Görgün, Yusuf Kaplan, Asım Cüneyd Köksal and many more distinguished academics join our faculty.
Our intensive course schedule, running every day from Monday to Sunday, is now published on our website.

akademikKadro.title: Academic Staff
akademikKadro.subtitle: Pioneers who act with civilizational awareness and cultivate scholarly character and disciplined thinking.

questions.a: 1st Level applications are accepted during the Fall Semester (September – October) each year, while the Preparatory Period applications are accepted during the Spring Semester (February – March). The Preparatory Period is not mandatory.

questions.q: How and Where Can I Apply?
questions.a: During the application period, you can access the application form link from our website or social media accounts. Applications must be filled out completely and accurately.
Students wishing to apply to MTO must have read the First Stage of the 100 Books List using the 4-pen technique prior to applying.

yorumlar.title:
Student
Reviews
yorumlar.subtitle: Evaluations from students who have benefited from our program.

items.yorum: Thanks to the MTO program, my perspective on the concept of civilization has completely changed. The depth of the academic staff and the richness of the course content are truly impressive.
It was a program that developed my conceptual thinking ability and broadened my horizons. It contributed greatly to both my academic and personal growth.
I have never seen another program that addresses the triad of knowledge, wisdom and enlightenment so holistically. MTO is a true school of civilization.
Every lesson delves deep into concepts. It is an educational approach that starts from the foundations, not the surface.

content.intro: In Pursuit of Truth, A New Education Model. In an age where traditional education systems make it easier to access information but harder to understand truth, the School of Civilization Vision lays the foundations of a new education model. For MTO students, learning means building an identity, expanding the horizon of thought, and forming civilizational consciousness. In this direction, the School of Civilization Vision aims for achievements consisting of three stages;
content.p1: Societies that lose their civilizational perspective and dynamics, spirit, ideals and horizon cannot escape being enslaved by others or teetering on the brink of extinction. In this direction, the School of Civilization Vision presents the '3T' model. A three-stage educational vision that can enable the step-by-step realization of the civilization of truth: Tevârûs - Temellûk - Temessûl.
content.p2: The student who closely follows the level courses and the 100 Book List develops faculties of Islamic hearing, comprehension and thinking; embarks on a long-term civilizational vision journey to rebuild all disciplines from scratch.
content.h3: 3- To cultivate a taste for language,
content.p3: Societies without founding concepts cannot build their own worlds. At MTO, students learn the conceptual and intellectual world of civilizations, embrace their own concepts and build their own phenomenology.
